# CLKWatchFaceLibrary.ErrorCode.notFileURL

**Case**

No file was found at the specified URL.

## Declaration

```swift
case notFileURL
```

## Errors

- **CLKWatchFaceLibrary.ErrorCode.invalidFile**: The specified file wasn’t a valid watch face file.
- **CLKWatchFaceLibrary.ErrorCode.permissionDenied**: The app does not have permission to read the specified file.
- **CLKWatchFaceLibrary.ErrorCode.faceNotAvailable**: The watch face is not available on this device.
- **CLKWatchFaceLibrary.ErrorCode.invalidFile**: The specified file wasn’t a valid watch face file.
- **CLKWatchFaceLibrary.ErrorCode.permissionDenied**: The app does not have permission to read the specified file.
- **CLKWatchFaceLibrary.ErrorCode.faceNotAvailable**: The watch face is not available on this device.
